name: _FindPESection
asm:
0x1400024C0      MOVSXD   RAX, dword ptr [RCX + 0x3c]
  0x1400024C4      ADD      RAX, RCX
  0x1400024C7      MOVZX    ECX, word ptr [RAX + 0x6]
  0x1400024CB      TEST     CX, CX
  0x1400024CE      JZ       0x14000250d
  0x1400024D0      MOVZX    R8D, word ptr [RAX + 0x14]
  0x1400024D5      SUB      ECX, 0x1
  0x1400024D8      LEA      RCX, [RCX + RCX*0x4]
  0x1400024DC      LEA      RAX, [RAX + R8*0x1 + 0x18]
  0x1400024E1      LEA      R9, [RAX + RCX*0x8 + 0x28]
  0x1400024E6      NOP      word ptr CS:[RAX + RAX*0x1]
  0x1400024F0      MOV      R8D, dword ptr [RAX + 0xc]
  0x1400024F4      MOV      RCX, R8
  0x1400024F7      CMP      RDX, R8
  0x1400024FA      JC       0x140002504
  0x1400024FC      ADD      ECX, dword ptr [RAX + 0x8]
  0x1400024FF      CMP      RDX, RCX
  0x140002502      JC       0x14000250f
  0x140002504      ADD      RAX, 0x28
  0x140002508      CMP      RAX, R9
  0x14000250B      JNZ      0x1400024f0
  0x14000250D      XOR      EAX, EAX
  0x14000250F      RET
